testcase.name: test_new_profile_fields_persist

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'TEST_Filmfare 2024' in ((None or [])) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d4e486f6c0>('awards') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d4e486f6c0> = {}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4.py:148: in test_new_profile_fields_persist assert "TEST_Filmfare 2024" in (prof.get("awards") or []) E AssertionError: assert 'TEST_Filmfare 2024' in ((None or [])) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d4e486f6c0>('awards') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d4e486f6c0> = {}.get

testcase.name: test_30mb_file_succeeds

failure.message: AssertionError: 30 MB upload should succeed under 100 MB limit, got 500 Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4.py:174: in test_30mb_file_succeeds assert r.status_code == 200, f"30 MB upload should succeed under 100 MB limit, got {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: 30 MB upload should succeed under 100 MB limit, got 500 Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
